title: bidens coronata var. trichosperma
intro: Bidens coronata var. trichosperma, also known as Trailing Beggarticks, is a plant species in the aster family that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Bidens coronata var. trichosperma include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Bidens coronata var. trichosperma is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
